article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Jan 28, 2023 (BSS) - Newly formed National Logistic Development and Coordination Committee at its first meeting decided to work on formulating a National Logistic Development Policy within a year.

Prime Minister's Principal Secretary and National Logistic Development and Coordination Committee Chairman M Tofazzel Hossain Miah presided over the meeting at the Prime Minister's Office (PMO) here this afternoon.

Top officials of different government and private offices and export and import

llm_connections.evidence_quote: Bangladesh's exports will be boosted by manifold if the logistics cost could be reduced.
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly refers to 'Bangladesh's exports' at the national level; exports are the country-wide export component relevant to the balance_of_trade definition.
